title: Slash Command Generator for Claude Code
detailMarkdown:
# Slash Command Generator for Claude Code
Create custom slash commands for Claude Code with templates, arguments, frontmatter metadata, and team-shared workflows stored in .claude/commands directory
**Category:** commands
**Author:** JSONbored
**Tags:** `slash-commands` `custom-commands` `workflow-automation` `templates` `team-collaboration` `productivity`

## Install
```bash
/slash-command-gen [command-name] [options]
```

## Usage
/slash-command-gen [command-name] [options]

## Links
- https://heyclau.de/commands/slash-command-gen
- https://docs.claude.com/en/docs/claude-code/slash-commands
